'''âp-dh-sh''' ('''kapadhash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wet|wet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wet|wet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-dh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kapadhash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipadhash|thipadhash]] || [[word:jipadhash|jipadhash]] || [[word:shipadhash|shipadhash]] || [[word:kipadhash|kipadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupadhash|thuthupadhash]] || [[word:jujupadhash|jujupadhash]] || [[word:shushupadhash|shushupadhash]] || [[word:kukupadhash|kukupadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupadhash|thupadhash]] || [[word:jupadhash|jupadhash]] || [[word:shupadhash|shupadhash]] || [[word:kupadhash|kupadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupadhash|thupadhash]] || [[word:jupadhash|jupadhash]] || [[word:shupadhash|shupadhash]] || [[word:kupadhash|kupadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepadhash|thepadhash]] || [[word:jepadhash|jepadhash]] || [[word:shepadhash|shepadhash]] || [[word:kepadhash|kepadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopadhash|thothopadhash]] || [[word:jojopadhash|jojopadhash]] || [[word:shoshopadhash|shoshopadhash]] || [[word:kokopadhash|kokopadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopadhash|thopadhash]] || [[word:jopadhash|jopadhash]] || [[word:shopadhash|shopadhash]] || [[word:kopadhash|kopadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopadhash|thopadhash]] || [[word:jopadhash|jopadhash]] || [[word:shopadhash|shopadhash]] || [[word:kopadhash|kopadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpadhash|thĂŠpadhash]] || [[word:jĂŠpadhash|jĂŠpadhash]] || [[word:shĂŠpadhash|shĂŠpadhash]] || [[word:kĂŠpadhash|kĂŠpadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapadhash|thathapadhash]] || [[word:jajapadhash|jajapadhash]] || [[word:shashapadhash|shashapadhash]] || [[word:kakapadhash|kakapadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapadhash|thapadhash]] || [[word:japadhash|japadhash]] || [[word:shapadhash|shapadhash]] || [[word:kapadhash|kapadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapadhash|thapadhash]] || [[word:japadhash|japadhash]] || [[word:shapadhash|shapadhash]] || [[word:kapadhash|kapadhash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapadhash|shapadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapadhash|goshapadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapadhash|gokishapadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapadhashnĂŒ|shapadhashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapadhashnknĂŒ|goshapadhashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadhashnĂŒ|gokishapadhashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapadhashĂ«|shapadhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkshĂ«|goshapadhashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapadhashĂ«|gokishapadhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadhashro|shapadhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkro|goshapadhashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadhashro|gokishapadhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadhashmu|shapadhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkmu|goshapadhashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadhashmu|gokishapadhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapadhasher|shapadhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapadhashnksher|goshapadhashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapadhasher|gokishapadhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapadhashng|shapadhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkng|goshapadhashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapadhashng|gokishapadhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapadhashya|shapadhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkya|goshapadhashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapadhashya|gokishapadhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapadhashyam|shapadhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkyam|goshapadhashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapadhashyam|gokishapadhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadhashnĂŒshĂ«|shapadhashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadhashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapadhashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadhashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapadhashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadhashnĂŒro|shapadhashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadhashnknĂŒro|goshapadhashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadhashnĂŒro|gokishapadhashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadhashnĂŒmu|shapadhashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadhashnknĂŒmu|goshapadhashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadhashnĂŒmu|gokishapadhashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadhashĂ«nĂŒ|shapadhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapadhashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadhashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapadhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadhashĂ«ro|shapadhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkshĂ«ro|goshapadhashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadhashĂ«ro|gokishapadhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadhashĂ«mu|shapadhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkshĂ«mu|goshapadhashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadhashĂ«mu|gokishapadhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadhashronĂŒ|shapadhashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkronĂŒ|goshapadhashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadhashronĂŒ|gokishapadhashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadhashroshĂ«|shapadhashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkroshĂ«|goshapadhashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadhashroshĂ«|gokishapadhashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadhashromu|shapadhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkromu|goshapadhashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadhashromu|gokishapadhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadhashmunĂŒ|shapadhashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkmunĂŒ|goshapadhashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadhashmunĂŒ|gokishapadhashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadhashmushĂ«|shapadhashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkmushĂ«|goshapadhashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadhashmushĂ«|gokishapadhashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadhashmuro|shapadhashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadhashnkmuro|goshapadhashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadhashmuro|gokishapadhashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
